source_visual_system: elegant high-density 2.5D business illustration PowerPoint visual system
best_for: 脚本生图转PPT中的正式汇报正文页、市场化产品体系、数智化平台、可信数据空间、能源数字化、政策背景、产品矩阵、运营机制和建设路线表达
visual_direction: elegant bright-white Chinese corporate briefing page with high-density readable content, refined 2.5D semantic illustration zones, unified royal-blue visual hierarchy, restrained low-saturation semantic objects, shallow platform depth, precise business diagrams, and no teal title bars, no page-by-page color theme switching, no poster composition, no full-photo background, no cyber dashboard, no decorative icon pile, and no low-density slogan page

canvas.scope: PowerPoint content-region image with dense text-and-diagram layout
canvas.background: use #FFFFFF as the main field, with #F7FAFF, #F2F6FF, #EEF4FF, or #F8FAFC only for local panels, platform bases, lanes, and illustration carriers; text-bearing areas must remain pure white or near-white
canvas.composition: formal PPT infographic composition that keeps the script's module count and relationship density while adding one main 2.5D semantic illustration zone or two small illustration zones; combine clean text cards, process axes, layered platforms, convergence maps, comparison panels, and refined object clusters
canvas.density: medium-high to high information density; preserve original script information hierarchy and key phrases, using alignment, grouping, short text blocks, and spatial layers instead of reducing content to slogans

color_palette.background: #FFFFFF main field; #F7FAFF, #F2F6FF, #EEF4FF, and #F8FAFC for local panels and illustration bases
color_palette.primary: #003B8F as the default dominant blue; #002880 or #002B75 only for deeper hierarchy anchors; #1D4ED8 only for small selected markers, never as a page-level theme
color_palette.role_lock: Across all pages, use the same color-role mapping: main section headers, module title bars, number badges, process axes, primary connectors, result bars, conclusion bars, and next-step bars all use royal blue #003B8F; risk/shortfall panels use red #D00000; neutral content cards use white or very pale blue; illustrations use low-saturation blue-cyan objects.
color_palette.text_primary: #0F172A, #111827, #1F2937, or #002880 for all readable body text
color_palette.text_secondary: #334155 or #475569 for secondary descriptions only; avoid pale gray for body copy
color_palette.line: #B8C7E6, #C7D4EE, #D6E0F2, or #DBEAFE for borders, dividers, grid lines, lanes, and connector routes
color_palette.semantic_colors: #0891B2 data cyan, #0F766E governance teal, #16A34A energy green, #6366F1 platform indigo, #F97316 industry orange, #EAB308 safety amber, used only inside small 2.5D objects, icon details, data-flow nodes, or semantic mini-scenes; never use these colors for title bars, result bars, conclusion bars, large cards, page backgrounds, or dominant page theme
color_palette.accent_red: #D00000, #D80000, or #E00000 only for risks, shortfalls, responsibility boundaries, warnings, or one critical conclusion; keep under 5%
color_palette.neutral: #FFFFFF, #F8FAFC, #F7FAFF, #F2F6FF, #EEF4FF, #E2E8F0, and #CBD5E1 for cards, text plates, platform bases, and calm sectioning
color_palette.rule: overall color ratio should feel like 65-75% white or near-white, 18-25% royal blue structure, 3-8% low-saturation semantic object colors, 5-10% pale blue-gray sectioning, and no more than 3-5% red emphasis; no teal/green/purple/orange solid title bars; use at most 2 auxiliary semantic colors per page and keep the dominant theme visually identical across pages

cross_page_consistency.hard_rule: Do not invent a different color theme per page. Every page in the same deck must look like the same template family even when the layout changes.
cross_page_consistency.headers: All section headers, module title bars, result bars, conclusion bars, next-step bars, and category bars must use royal blue #003B8F with white text, or white cards with royal-blue text. Do not use teal, green, purple, orange, cyan, or gray as any title or result bar.
cross_page_consistency.conclusion_bars: Bottom conclusion/result/next-step bars must also use royal blue #003B8F. Teal may appear only as a small icon stroke, tiny node, thin connector accent, or low-saturation object detail, never as a bar fill.
cross_page_consistency.risk_panels: Use red #D00000 only for risk/shortfall/constraint content. Red may appear as a small header, badge, icon, or border, but must not become a full-page theme.
cross_page_consistency.illustrations: 2.5D objects should share the same material language: white base, pale blue shadow, royal-blue/cyan details, soft shadow, low height, and no strong perspective.

typography.title: clear bold modern Chinese sans-serif, formal and elegant, close to Microsoft YaHei / PingFang SC
typography.body: high-readability modern Chinese sans-serif, regular-medium to semibold, left-aligned where possible, with stable line height and phrase-based body copy
typography.labels: compact Chinese labels and evidence tags must remain dark, crisp, horizontal, and placed only on clean white or near-white carriers
typography.text_quality: Chinese text must look like vector text in a high-resolution Office / PowerPoint screenshot; all visible text must stay exact, dark, sharp, and separate from 2.5D objects, shadows, connectors, and decorative layers

font_rules: 按 4K 级 Office 截图视觉精度理解画面，16:9 构图下所有文字、图标、线条、边框、平台底座和 2.5D 对象都必须高清锐利；这是清晰度目标，不是实际输出尺寸要求。
文字必须呈现真实 PowerPoint 可编辑文本的视觉效果，像矢量文字而不是插画化文字、海报字、渲染字或图片贴字；字形端正稳定，笔画清晰均匀，边缘锐利，横平竖直，基线整齐。
正文文字使用 100% 不透明实色填充，优先 #0F172A、#111827、#1F2937 或 #002880；禁止浅灰正文、半透明文字、渐变文字、发光文字、描边文字、阴影文字、带质感纹理的文字和伪文字。
正文必须落在纯白、近白或极浅干净承载面上；不得把文字压在 2.5D 平台、设备、人物、数据流、阴影、渐变、纹理、光效或彩色对象上。
保持脚本原有高信息密度，优先用分组、层级、短语化、编号、连接线和留白组织内容；不得把高密页面改成少量大字口号、海报标语或低信息主视觉页。
如信息较多，优先扩大文字承载区、压缩配图占比、减少装饰对象或拆分图解层级；不得通过缩小到不可读字号、降低文字对比度或增加密排来塞内容。
layout_patterns: left dense text logic area plus right refined 2.5D semantic illustration zone
top source conditions plus middle 2.5D convergence platform plus bottom result band
central royal-blue process axis with small 2.5D semantic object clusters on both sides
left-right comparison matrix with refined 2.5D support objects and a bottom target strip
multi-module high-density card grid over a shallow 2.5D platform base
layered data-space / platform architecture with clean text plates and controlled object depth
roadmap or task chain with low-height 2.5D nodes, business-object clusters, and concise labels
policy / market / company / product relationship map with one elegant explanatory illustration carrier
layout_usage_rule: Use layout_blueprints as candidate starting points only. Choose the structure by the page's semantic relation, not by decoration. Every page should preserve the script's module count and core relationship, then add one main 2.5D explanatory visual or two smaller visuals that clarify the business meaning. Layouts may vary, but the same deck must reuse the same color roles, header treatment, card border style, connector style, icon stroke weight, 2.5D object material, and bottom conclusion-band style. Do not repeat the same layout on adjacent pages unless the script is a deliberate sequence.

layout_blueprints.name: 高密逻辑区 + 右侧图解区

labels: 高密文字模块 / 关系卡片
2.5D 汇聚平台 / 数据底座
建设任务 / 能力模块
基础 / 机会 / 优势
短板 / 风险 / 约束
2.5D 支撑对象 / 转化底座
语义对象簇 / 业务场景图解

visual_elements.allowed: pure-white page field, royal-blue section bars, pale blue-gray lanes, crisp white text plates, low-height 2.5D platform bases, refined data-flow lines, layered database cylinders, digital platform screens, energy equipment silhouettes, grid floors, document stacks, product cards, capability cubes, simple human-team silhouettes, governance nodes, market-service objects, industrial park miniatures, clean arrows, soft shadows, semantic object clusters, and restrained icons used only as auxiliary markers
visual_elements.avoid: full-page photography, dark technology dashboard, cyberpunk neon, huge 3D render scene, strong perspective, hard reflections, glassmorphism, noisy gradients, large decorative objects without business meaning, dense unreadable tables, icon arrays, every card with an icon, teal/green/cyan/purple/orange title bars, teal/green/cyan result bars, purple/orange dominant themes, page-by-page palette switching, cute stickers, random logos, fake seals, pseudo-text, watermarks, page numbers, unrelated numbers, and advertising poster composition

rendering_constraints: Generate as an elegant high-density PPT body-region source image with refined 2.5D business illustration, not as a low-density poster or a decorative concept image.
Preserve the script's original information density: keep the main modules, relationship order, and key phrases visible unless the script itself marks them as auxiliary.

Each page should include one main semantic 2.5D illustration carrier or two smaller carriers; the illustration must explain the page's business meaning, such as platform, data flow, product matrix, market service, policy environment, team capability, delivery mechanism, or operating loop.
2.5D objects must stay in independent illustration carriers, shallow platform zones, or background support layers; they must not intrude into text plates or sit underneath readable text.

Use shallow depth, soft shadows, low-saturation object colors, clean geometry, and Office-like precision. Keep every page in the same deck on the same blue-white visual system. Large solid bars must be royal blue only, except red risk bars. Avoid strong perspective, cinematic lighting, glossy 3D, complex materials, or image-generation art style.

Text hierarchy remains primary. Illustration enriches and explains the diagram; it must not reduce the amount of script content, weaken the business relationship, or steal focus from the reading path.

Keep all visible text dark, crisp, horizontal, and on pure-white or near-white text plates. Do not generate pseudo-text, pseudo-English, watermarks, logos, page numbers, dates, random labels, or unrelated digits.
The final image should feel like a premium formal corporate PowerPoint infographic: elegant, diagram-rich, content-dense, and suitable for China Electricity Council internal reporting.
